titleStmt.title: SII 9.240: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 240. (A.R. No. 549 of 1915.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE COURT-YARD OF THE RAMALINGA TEMPLE AT GURUZALA, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated the 5th year of the Chālukya king Jagadēkamalladēva (II), Dundubhi, Pushya, śu. 6, Śukravāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, corresponding to A.D. 1142 December 25 Friday. Under the orders of the Mahāpradhāna Daṇḍanāyaka Kēsimayya, his son the Daṇḍanāyaka Chīyamarasa is said to have made a gift of land for the service of the god Rāmēśvara at Gurindāla in Mañchālu thirty-six, a subdivision of Ādavani five-hundred. Kēsimayya is also stated to have been Hērilāḷa-Sandhivigrahi and in charge of Manadadi-nāḍu, Miriti-nāḍu, Kōsage-nāḍu, Gālidirāla, Kallakelagu-nāḍu, Koḷḷihāke-nāḍu and Sindavāḍi-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī . namastuṁgaśirascuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha(ṁ)mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti sa
mastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayaku
ḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatpratāpacakravartti jagadēkamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivri
ddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire kalyāṇapurada nelavīḍinoḷsukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rā
jyaṁgeyyuttamire tvatpādapadmōpajīvi © samastapraṣastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānananta®purādhyakṣaṁ ka
riturayapaṭṭasāhaṇi śrīkaraṇaṁ sarvvādhyakṣaṁ hērilāḷasandhivigrahi manadaḍināḍu miṟitināḍa kōsagenāḍa gāḷidiṟā
la kallakeḷagunāḍa koḷḷihākenāḍa sindavāḍināḍa heggaḍe sēnādhipati mahāpracaṁḍadaṁḍanāyakaṁ kēsimayyaṁgaḷa besadiṁ
śrīmahāpradhānaṁ sēnādhipati magaṁ daṇḍanāyakaṁ cīyamarasar sindavāḍi sāyiramanāḷutti(r)®du Ādavaniyayinūṟaṟa baḷi
ya maṁcalu mūvattāṟuṁbāḍadoḷagaṇa tuṁgabhadrānadiya teṁkaṇa taḍiya śrīdakṣiṇavāraṇāśi guriṁdāla śrīrāmēśvara
dēvaraṁgabhōga raṁgabhōga pātrapāvuḷa khaṁḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōddhāra tapōdhanarāhāradāna nandādīvi(ṁ)ge nivēdyakkaṁ caitrapaitrakkaṁ
śrīmajagadēkamallavarśa 5deneya duṁdubhisaṁvatsarada puśya suddha 6 śukravāradanduttarāyaṇasaṁkramaṇa
nimittadiṁ daṇḍanāyakaṁ cīyamarasaru guriṁdāliṁ haḍuvaṇa kōkuṁbāḷaṁ dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭarā gōḍaṁ mattaru 42 nivēdyakkaṁ
nandādīvigegaṁ caitrapaitrakkaṁ mattaru ha 10 brahmapuriya brāhmaṇarige mattaru ha 10 kalikuṭigavōjugaḷige mattaru
ha 12 matta guriṁdālavōjugaḷige mattaru ha 10 pāvuḷakke mattaru ha 10 Ī dharmmavanāvanōrvvanu pratipāḷisidavaru
śrīvāraṇāśikurukṣētravargghyatīrtthaprayāgeyalu sāvira kavileya kōḍuṁ koḷagugaḷaṁ suvarṇnāvēṣṭanaṁ māḍi caturvvē
dapāragarige dānaṁ māḍida phalavī dharmmavanāvanōrbbaraḷidaravarigā sthānadalā kavileymaṁ brāhmaṇarumaṁ koṁda dōṣavakku © .
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . svadattadvigaṇaṁ puṇyaṁ pūrvvadattānupā
layēt pūrvvadattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niḻphalaṁ bhavēt . bahubhi(ḥ)rvvasudhā dattaṁ rājabhiḥ sagarādibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā dattaṁ tasya tasya tadādayē .
sāsanamāvudidelliya sāsanavārittaridēke salisuva nānī sāsanavaneṁba pātakanā sakaḷarauravakke gaḷagaḷaniḷiguṁ .
staṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
Digital edition of SII 9.240 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
